moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: The genre-blending superstar Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday today, July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Today's Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone! What's your favourite track from the genre-bending artist?

angles.name: Music Mix
angles.copy: From 'Rockstar' to 'Circles', Post Malone has given us so many hits. Celebrating his 31st today!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in Canada, Mexico, and the USA is well underway, with knockout stage matches keeping fans on the edge of their seats until the final on July 19.

angles.name: Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: Who are you backing in the World Cup knockout stages? Every match is massive now! #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: UK Fan Excitement
angles.copy: The World Cup drama continues! Which game has been your highlight so far? Keep up with all the action.

moments.title: 50 Cent's 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic rapper and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on Monday, July 6, 2026.

angles.name: Birthday Anthem
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your go-to track from the hip-hop legend?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: From 'In Da Club' to 'Candy Shop', 50 Cent dominated the charts. Wishing him a very happy 51st on Monday!

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Solo & Beyond
angles.copy: Beyond The Beatles, Ringo Starr has had an incredible solo career. Wishing him a fantastic 86th birthday this Tuesday!

moments.title: Beck celebrates 56th birthday
moments.blurb: The acclaimed alternative artist Beck, known for his eclectic sound, turns 56 on Wednesday, July 8, 2026.

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the brilliantly innovative Beck on Wednesday! 'Loser' or 'Where It's At' – which is your favourite?

angles.name: Genre-Bender
angles.copy: From folk to funk, Beck's sound is truly unique. Celebrating his 56th birthday this Wednesday!

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and grunge icon Courtney Love turns 62 on Thursday, July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Rock Star Tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring impact of Courtney Love, who turns 62 this Thursday. A true force in rock music!

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 culminates with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals on the weekend of July 11-12.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Finale
angles.copy: It's almost finals weekend at Wimbledon! Who are you hoping to see lift the trophies on Centre Court?

angles.name: Sporting Spectacle
angles.copy: The grass court season reaches its peak! Get ready for a thrilling weekend of tennis as Wimbledon crowns its champions.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega turns 67
moments.blurb: The influential folk-pop singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega celebrates her 67th birthday on Friday, July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Folk-Pop Gem
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega on Friday! 'Luka' or 'Tom's Diner' – which classic is your favourite?

angles.name: Timeless Songwriter
angles.copy: Celebrating the poetic artistry of Suzanne Vega, turning 67 this Friday. Her music truly stands the test of time.

moments.title: Richie Sambora turns 67
moments.blurb: Bon Jovi's former lead guitarist and rock legend Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on Friday, July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Richie Sambora on Friday! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar riff he gave us?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Richie Sambora, who turns 67 this Friday. A true rock and roll legend!

moments.title: Luke Hemmings turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist of the Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on Thursday, July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer this Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS anthem?

angles.name: A Decade of Hits
angles.copy: From YouTube covers to global superstardom, Luke Hemmings has been a force in music. Wishing him a happy 30th on Thursday!

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays for England and Wales officially begin the week of July 21-23, marking the start of a long break for families across the UK.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are almost here! For many in England and Wales, school's out from July 21-23. What are your big plans?

angles.name: Family Fun Planning
angles.copy: Summer break is just around the corner! Get ready for family adventures as school holidays kick off across the UK.

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, 2026, celebrating its 20th edition with a diverse lineup including David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Who's excited for Latitude Festival 2026? With David Byrne, Teddy Swims & Lewis Capaldi, it's set to be huge! #LatitudeFestival

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Henham Park is getting ready for Latitude! Celebrating 20 years of music, arts and culture from July 23-26. Get planning!
